tn.t: [计] 终端节点, 传送网络
tn.d: n a state in east central United States

tnb.t: abbr. 国家电力公司（Tenaga Nasional Berhad）；三硝基苯（Trinitrobenzene）

tncs.t: abbr. thymic nurse cells 胸腺哺育细胞

tnd.t: abbr. tender 投标; tinned 镀锡的; 包锡的; 罐装的

tnds.t: abbr. tactical navigational display system 战术导航显示系统

tne.t: [医][=tris sodium chloride EDTA buffer]三羟甲基氨基甲烷氯化钠EDTA缓冲剂

tnf.d: n a proinflammatory cytokine that is produced by white blood cells (monocytes and macrophages); has an antineoplastic effect but causes inflammation (as in rheumatoid arthritis)

tni.t: abbr. Traffic Noise Index 交通噪音指数

tnk.t: [计]= TaNK,槽路，储能电路，振荡回路

tnm.t: abbr. tactical nuclear missile 战术核导弹

tnnd.t: abbr. 他奶奶的（网络用语）；甜腻腻的（网络用语）

tnpk.t: abbr. turnpike 征收通行费的公路

tnr.t: [医][=tonic neck reflex]紧张性颈反射，颈强直性反射

tns.t: abbr. 特恩斯（市场咨询公司Taylor Nelson Sofres）；交易网络服务（Transparent Network Substrate）
tns.d: n a state in east central United States

tnt.t:
[化] 梯恩梯
[医] 三硝基甲苯
tnt.d: n. explosive consisting of a yellow crystalline compound that is a flammable toxic derivative of toluene
